title: 30 Socratic Dialogues for Deep Sleep
description:
Walk through ancient Athens with Socrates as he teaches that true wisdom begins with questioning what you think you know. Discover how the examined life and admitting uncertainty can lead to deeper rest.

✦ Learn the Socratic Method: questions that help you examine your thoughts
✦ Discover maieutics: dialogue as a path to peace
✦ Find calm in aporia—the beauty of not knowing
✦ Explore virtue through self-reflection

Subscribe and hit 🔔 for new sleep stories every day.

Ambient storytelling with philosophical wisdom and calm music for restful sleep and contemplation.
